name: @remudero/daemon-client-smoke
description: A minimal internal CONSUMER of the GENERATED @remudero/api-client (MASTER-PLAN §7A). Exists so a breaking daemon surface change fails a real consumer package's typecheck in the SAME PR, before any real client (apps/dashboard, W3-T2+) exists. See scripts/no-hand-rolled-fetch-check.mjs and test/consumer-breaking-change.test.ts.
